hero.headline: Heritage. Refined. Gifted.
hero.lede: A Moroccan B2B gifting house composing artisan rituals for corporate occasions.

editorial.photo_alt: Hands of a Berber cooperative artisan, cold-pressing argan oil at first light
editorial.headline: An object becomes a gesture.
editorial.p1: Every Barbaria piece carries the hand of a Moroccan artisan and the season of its terroir. We compose them into gifts that mean something — to the buyer, to the recipient, to the cooperative that made them.
editorial.p2: No off-the-shelf templates. Every inquiry begins with a conversation.

bento.compose_lede: Mix the rituals into a bespoke selection your maison signs off on.

heritage_3up.quote: Every ritual preserves a legacy. Every gift empowers an artisan.
heritage_3up.c2_body: Six ateliers, fairly compensated, named on every product.
heritage_3up.c3_body: Made-to-order at the atelier, in volume that matches the moment.

cosmetics.title: Natural Cosmetics
cosmetics.subtitle: Premium skincare formulated with the finest ingredients from Morocco, by hands that know.

huile-argan.name: Pure Argan Oil
huile-argan.description: Morocco's finest oil, cold-pressed by first mechanical press with no solvents. Golden, light, non-greasy. Rich in vitamin E and omega 6-9.
huile-argan.whatsapp_msg: Hello, I would like to order Barbaria Morocco Pure Argan Oil.

huile-figue.name: Prickly Pear Seed Oil
huile-figue.tagline: Ultra rare - 1 ton of fruit per liter
huile-figue.description: The world's richest plant-based source of vitamin E. 1 ton of prickly pears for 1 liter of oil - cold mechanical extraction. Deep cellular regeneration and intense anti-wrinkle action.
huile-figue.whatsapp_msg: Hello, I would like to order Barbaria Morocco Prickly Pear Seed Oil.

huile-saad.name: S'ad Oil (Chufa)
huile-saad.description: Chufa seed oil with a unique earthy-sweet natural fragrance. Used by Moroccan women as a body perfume and hair treatment for centuries. Gentle on sensitive skin.
huile-saad.whatsapp_msg: Hello, I would like to order Barbaria Morocco S'ad Oil.

huile-ricin.name: Pure Castor Oil
huile-ricin.description: Cold-pressed, thick and nourishing. Stimulates hair growth, strengthens eyebrows and lashes, deeply moisturizes dry areas. 100% pure with no additives or preservatives.
huile-ricin.whatsapp_msg: Hello, I would like to order Barbaria Morocco Pure Castor Oil.

huile-rose.name: Pure Rose Oil
huile-rose.description: Rosa Damascena essential oil from the Dades Valley. A few drops are enough. One of the most precious oils in the world - powerful anti-wrinkle, regenerating, with an exceptional floral fragrance.
huile-rose.whatsapp_msg: Hello, I would like to order Barbaria Morocco Pure Rose Oil.

huile-nigelle.name: Pure Black Seed Oil
huile-nigelle.description: Cold-pressed, a powerful natural anti-inflammatory. Very high demand in the Arab world for its virtues. Anti-hair loss, purifies the scalp, treats problematic skin.
huile-nigelle.whatsapp_msg: Hello, I would like to order Barbaria Morocco Pure Black Seed Oil.

serum-anti-age.name: Royal Anti-Age Serum
serum-anti-age.description: Prickly Pear regenerates cells, Argan deeply nourishes, Rose illuminates and plumps. Intense anti-wrinkle, visible results in 4 weeks. The best-seller of the range.
serum-anti-age.whatsapp_msg: Hello, I would like to order Barbaria Morocco Royal Anti-Age Serum.

serum-eclat.name: Radiance & Even Skin Serum
serum-eclat.description: Argan + Prickly Pear + S'ad oil. S'ad brings a natural golden note to the skin. Illuminates the complexion, evens skin tone, reduces dark spots.
serum-eclat.whatsapp_msg: Hello, I would like to order Barbaria Morocco Radiance Serum.

serum-cheveux.name: Strengthening Hair Serum
serum-cheveux.description: Castor (growth & thickness) + Black Seed (anti-loss, scalp) + Argan (shine). The most complete natural hair formula. Stimulates growth, nourishes the scalp.
serum-cheveux.whatsapp_msg: Hello, I would like to order Barbaria Morocco Hair Serum.

serum-sourcils.name: Eyebrow & Lash Serum
serum-sourcils.description: Pure densifying Castor + regenerating Prickly Pear + soothing Rose. Serum formula for the delicate eye area. Densifies brows and lashes, stimulates growth without irritation.
serum-sourcils.whatsapp_msg: Hello, I would like to order Barbaria Morocco Eyebrow & Lash Serum.

serum-contour-yeux.name: Eye Contour Serum
serum-contour-yeux.tagline: The gentlest for the most delicate area
serum-contour-yeux.description: Ultra-concentrated Prickly Pear + decongesting S'ad + toning Rose. Anti-wrinkle eye contour, reduces dark circles, plumps the delicate skin around the eyes.
serum-contour-yeux.whatsapp_msg: Hello, I would like to order Barbaria Morocco Eye Contour Serum.

serum-corps.name: Anti-Stretch Mark Body Serum
serum-corps.description: Repairing Argan + firming Castor + regenerating Black Seed. Prevents and fades stretch marks, firms skin, improves elasticity. Long-term use.
serum-corps.whatsapp_msg: Hello, I would like to order Barbaria Morocco Body Serum.

gommage-nila.name: Nila, Argan & Orange Blossom Scrub
gommage-nila.description: Barbaria Morocco's signature scrub. Pure Nila (indigo) + Argan + Orange Blossom Water. Beautiful natural blue-black color. Deeply purifies, detoxifies, leaves skin renewed.
gommage-nila.whatsapp_msg: Hello, I would like to order Barbaria Morocco Nila Scrub.

gommage-aker-fassi.name: Aker Fassi & Rose Scrub
gommage-aker-fassi.description: Aker fassi (pomegranate bark from Fès) + Dades Rose Water + Cane Sugar. Exfoliates, illuminates, plumps. Beautiful natural pink color. Highly appreciated in spas.
gommage-aker-fassi.whatsapp_msg: Hello, I would like to order Barbaria Morocco Aker Fassi Scrub.

masque-ghassoul-rose.name: Ghassoul & Rose Water Mask
masque-ghassoul-rose.description: Ghassoul (volcanic clay from Morocco's Middle Atlas, unique to Morocco) + pure Rose Water. Absorbs impurities and excess sebum, tightens pores. Velvety, soft skin.
masque-ghassoul-rose.whatsapp_msg: Hello, I would like to order Barbaria Morocco Ghassoul Mask.

gommage-sidr.name: Sidr & Argan Scrub
gommage-sidr.description: Sidr leaf powder (sacred jujube) + Argan Oil + natural Honey. Used for centuries as a sacred cleanser in Moroccan tradition. Cleanses, fortifies, softens.
gommage-sidr.whatsapp_msg: Hello, I would like to order Barbaria Morocco Sidr Scrub.

gommage-levres.name: Aker Fassi & Honey Lip Scrub
gommage-levres.description: Aker fassi + natural Honey + fine Sugar. The most traditional lip care used by Moroccan women. Gently exfoliates and naturally tints lips pink. No makeup needed.
gommage-levres.whatsapp_msg: Hello, I would like to order Barbaria Morocco Lip Scrub.

masque-corps.name: Ghassoul & Argan Body Mask
masque-corps.description: Ghassoul + Argan + Orange Blossom Water. Complete body mask after scrubbing. Seals in the benefits of the hammam. Ultra-soft skin. Ideal in spa protocols.
masque-corps.whatsapp_msg: Hello, I would like to order Barbaria Morocco Body Mask.

eau-rose.name: Pure Dades Rose Water
eau-rose.description: Rosa Damascena steam-distilled in the Dades Valley. The most used product in Moroccan households. Tones, tightens pores, illuminates. Cosmetic and culinary use.
eau-rose.whatsapp_msg: Hello, I would like to order Barbaria Morocco Rose Water.

eau-fleur-oranger.name: Pure Orange Blossom Water
eau-fleur-oranger.description: Citrus Aurantium distilled in Fès and Meknès. The most used floral water in Morocco. Soothing and anti-stress, brightens complexion. Cosmetic, culinary and aromatic use.
eau-fleur-oranger.whatsapp_msg: Hello, I would like to order Barbaria Morocco Orange Blossom Water.

hydrolat-romarin.name: Rosemary Hydrolat
hydrolat-romarin.description: Rosmarinus Officinalis from Moroccan mountains. Global hair trend for 2026. Very popular in Europe for hair growth. Stimulates circulation, reduces hair loss.
hydrolat-romarin.whatsapp_msg: Hello, I would like to order Barbaria Morocco Rosemary Hydrolat.

hydrolat-lavande.name: Atlas Lavender Hydrolat
hydrolat-lavande.description: Atlas lavender artisanally distilled. Superior quality to ordinary lavender. Soothing, healing, anti-acne. Suitable for sensitive skin and babies.
hydrolat-lavande.whatsapp_msg: Hello, I would like to order Barbaria Morocco Atlas Lavender Hydrolat.

hydrolat-neroli.name: Neroli Hydrolat
hydrolat-neroli.description: Bitter orange blossom water, more concentrated and luxurious than the classic. Powerful anti-wrinkle, cellular regeneration. Luxury tonic with a deep, intoxicating floral scent.
hydrolat-neroli.whatsapp_msg: Hello, I would like to order Barbaria Morocco Neroli Hydrolat.

brume-rose-oranger.name: Rose & Orange Blossom Toning Mist
brume-rose-oranger.description: Morocco's two iconic hydrolats united: Dades Rose + Fès Orange Blossom. Double toning and soothing action. Unique Moroccan floral fragrance. The ideal gift.
brume-rose-oranger.whatsapp_msg: Hello, I would like to order Barbaria Morocco Rose & Orange Blossom Mist.

savon-nila-oranger.name: Beldi Nila & Orange Blossom Soap
savon-nila-oranger.description: Beldi base (fermented black olive) + Nila (pure indigo) + Orange Blossom. Beautiful natural bluish color. Intense purification, natural detox. The signature soap of the range.
savon-nila-oranger.whatsapp_msg: Hello, I would like to order Barbaria Morocco Nila & Orange Blossom Soap.

savon-aker-rose.name: Beldi Aker Fassi & Rose Soap
savon-aker-rose.description: Beldi base + Aker fassi (natural pomegranate pigment) + Dades Rose Water. Exfoliating and illuminating. Sublime natural pink color. Leaves skin rosy and luminous.
savon-aker-rose.whatsapp_msg: Hello, I would like to order Barbaria Morocco Aker Fassi Soap.

savon-saad-musc.name: Beldi S'ad & White Musk Soap
savon-saad-musc.tagline: The most luxurious - Gulf & Arab countries
savon-saad-musc.description: Beldi base + S'ad oil + natural white musk. Warm, woody, enveloping fragrance without alcohol. Purifies and scents lastingly. The most luxurious soap in the range.
savon-saad-musc.whatsapp_msg: Hello, I would like to order Barbaria Morocco S'ad & Musk Soap.

massage-argan-oud.description: Argan + natural Oud extract. Oud is a profound cultural tradition in Gulf countries. Woody, warm, luxurious fragrance. Deeply nourishes, lastingly perfumes.

massage-argan-jasmin.name: Argan & Jasmine Massage Oil
massage-argan-jasmin.description: Argan + Moroccan Jasmine. Intoxicating floral fragrance, natural relaxant. For a full-body relaxing massage. Ideal in the evening before sleep, stress and muscle tension.

ingredients.title: Our Ingredients
ingredients.subtitle: Straight from the heart of Morocco.

argan.name: Pure Argan
argan.desc: Cold-pressed at Berber cooperatives in the Atlas. Rich in vitamin E and essential fatty acids.

orange.name: Orange Blossom
orange.desc: Steam-distilled. Soothing, regenerating, with a delicate floral fragrance.

nila.name: Nila
nila.desc: A natural blue pigment used for centuries in North African skincare. Purifying and detoxifying.

textile.title: Artisanal Textile
textile.subtitle: Every Moroccan carpet carries a story. We give it a new life.
textile.story: Patterns passed through generations, artisan hands that have woven dreams, traditions and emotions for centuries. At Barbaria Morocco, we transform these precious fabrics into unique pieces.
textile.impact: Carrying a Barbaria bag means adopting a piece of history and taking part in a real social impact.

sac_femme.name: Women's Handbag
sac_femme.description: Entirely handmade from authentic Moroccan carpet fabric. Genuine leather handles. Each piece is unique  - no two bags are alike.
sac_femme.whatsapp_msg: Hello, I would like to order a Barbaria Morocco Women's Handbag.

sac_homme.name: Men's Shoulder Bag
sac_homme.description: Men's shoulder bag in Berber fabric with camel leather. Comes with exclusive Barbaria pins  - gold enamel Moroccan carpet motifs. Authenticity and luxury.
sac_homme.whatsapp_msg: Hello, I would like to order a Barbaria Morocco Men's Shoulder Bag.

pouche.name: Pouche
pouche.description: Berber fabric pouch with hand-embroidered geometric patterns. Perfect as a makeup bag or travel accessory. One-of-a-kind piece.
pouche.whatsapp_msg: Hello, I would like to order a Barbaria Morocco Pouche.

pins.name: Pins by Collection
pins.description: Pin collections paying tribute to the heritage of each Moroccan city. Fès, Marrakech, Casablanca, Sahara, Essaouira, North/Chamal  - each city has its symbols.
collections: Fès Collection  - Fassi Hat, Babouche, Takchita
Marrakech Collection  - Tanjia, Koutoubia, Palm Tree
North/Chamal  - Cap Spartel, Chefchaouen, Fishing Boat

about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: Barbaria Morocco
about.story_1: Born in the heart of Morocco, Barbaria Morocco is a brand built on a deep conviction: the finest creations are those shaped together by nature and human hands.
about.story_2: We work directly with Berber cooperatives and local artisans  - women weavers, soap masters, oil pressers  - to create products that carry a true story.
about.story_3: Using or wearing a Barbaria product means adopting a piece of Moroccan history and supporting a real social impact on artisan families.

natural.title: Natural
natural.desc: 100% natural origin ingredients, free from parabens and sulfates.

artisanal.title: Artisanal
artisanal.desc: Handmade by Moroccan artisans using ancestral recipes and techniques.

moroccan.title: Moroccan
moroccan.desc: Rooted in Morocco's heritage  - from the Sahara to the Atlas, from Fès to Essaouira.

Hello Barbaria Morocco,

I would like to order:

rituals.empty_state: No pieces match the current filters.

story.hero_lede: Three generations of Moroccan craft, one editorial maison.
story.ch1_p1: Founded in 1972 by Hassan El Bouzidi, a fragrance buyer who left Casablanca for the Atlas to source argan, rose and saffron directly from the cooperatives.
story.ch1_p2: Half a century later, Barbaria remains a family enterprise — and now a B2B gifting house composing rituals for corporate occasions.
story.ch2_p1: Every piece is made-to-order. Black soap is pressed when the order lands; cedar boxes are carved from three-year-aged wood; rose water is distilled once at dawn.
story.ch2_p2: We do not warehouse. We compose, we ship, we close the file.
story.ch3_p1: An object is not a product. It is a gesture — to the recipient, to the artisan who made it, to the terroir it carries.
story.ch3_p2: Our work is to keep that line short, named, and traceable.
story.pull_quote: What you give carries who you are.

ateliers.hero_lede: Barbaria works with six Moroccan cooperatives across argan, rose, ceramic, cedar, weaving and clay traditions.

journal.meta_description: Field notes, dispatches, portraits — six editorial pieces from the Barbaria atelier and its cooperative partners across Morocco.
